title: What Is In Iran’s 10-Point Proposal, and How Does It Compare to U.S. Demands?
summary_full: The plan, which reasserts Iran’s control of the Strait of Hormuz and maintains the country’s right to nuclear enrichment, is not the same as the one President Trump said was a “workable basis” for negotiations.
summary_public: The plan, which reasserts Iran’s control of the Strait of Hormuz and maintains the country’s right to nuclear enrichment, is not the same as the one President Trump said was a “workable basis” for negotiations.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: maintains the country’s right to nuclear enrichment
